purpose: End-to-end task contracts for registered skills. Each case verifies trigger, execution, output, and failure branch expectations.

cases.user_prompt: 把这个客服升级流程创建 SKILL.md，并给出快速版。
execution_contract: Classify the requested skill type before drafting.
Draft frontmatter and required body sections.
Run validate-skill.py or report exact validation failures.
output_contract: A SKILL.md draft or concrete file path.
Validation result or a specific list of failed checks.

failure_branch.condition: The request lacks a concrete workflow or usage example.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask for the smallest missing example before finalizing the skill.

cases.user_prompt: I have a design document for a deployment playbook; implement it as a reusable skill.
execution_contract: Extract reusable workflows, commands, and references from the design document.
Keep essential instructions in SKILL.md and move optional detail to references.
Validate that description contains trigger conditions rather than procedure.
output_contract: A reusable skill folder shape or SKILL.md content plan.
A concise validation checklist for handoff.

failure_branch.condition: The design document contains live credentials or private endpoints.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Stop and request redaction before including examples or external validation.

cases.user_prompt: 审查这个 skill，看看能不能过交付门槛。
execution_contract: Run validate-skill.py before manual review.
Score all 23 checklist items with evidence.
Produce a weighted five-axis Quality Scorecard.

failure_branch.condition: validate-skill.py fails.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Stop manual review and report format failures first.

cases.user_prompt: Use skill-review-workflow to review skill-review-workflow itself.
execution_contract: Apply the same 23-item checklist to the review skill itself.
Check that scoring rules and output template do not contradict each other.
Classify self-reference issues by severity.
output_contract: A list of self-consistency gaps or an explicit no-finding result.

failure_branch.condition: The review process asks the agent to modify the skill under review.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Reject the edit path and report findings only.

cases.user_prompt: 我要删掉一个目录，命令里会用 rm -rf，先帮我过安全门。
execution_contract: Resolve the target path before any destructive action.
Confirm the path is inside the intended workspace.
Require explicit approval or safer alternatives when risk remains.
output_contract: The exact safety checks that passed or failed.

failure_branch.condition: The resolved target is outside the intended root.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Refuse deletion and ask for a narrower target.

cases.user_prompt: Review this diff for API key, password, and token leaks before commit.
execution_contract: Scan staged and unstaged diffs for secret-like patterns.
Treat positive matches as blocking until removed or rotated.
Avoid echoing secret values in the report.
output_contract: Redacted locations for any detected issue.

failure_branch.condition: A probable secret appears in the diff.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Stop commit workflow and require removal or rotation.

cases.user_prompt: This production migration feels risky; get a second opinion from another model.
execution_contract: Run the dispatch safety gate before any external review.
Package artifact and contract without leaking the author's claim.
Classify second-model findings as valid, trade-off, noise, or contract-misread.
output_contract: A redaction decision: safe-to-dispatch, redacted, local-only, or abort.

failure_branch.condition: Secrets or regulated data cannot be redacted safely.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Use local-only degraded review or abort.

cases.user_prompt: 换个模型检查这个安全 skill 有没有漏掉危险分支。
execution_contract: Redact private repo context before dispatch.
Ask the second model to find issues rather than confirm the first answer.
Resolve disagreements against the artifact contract.
output_contract: A final approve/request-changes decision with rationale.

failure_branch.condition: No external model is available.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Run a degraded local adversarial pass and label confidence accordingly.

cases.user_prompt: 这个 skill 已审查通过，走完整 pipeline 发布它。
execution_contract: Run authoring, review plus security, cross-check, package, and deploy stages in order.
Stop at the first failed gate and report the exact failed stage.
Record platform deployment paths.
output_contract: Package artifact and platform install summary when all gates pass.

failure_branch.condition: Review or security gate fails.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Do not package; return the repair list and failed gate.

cases.user_prompt: Release this reviewed skill to Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
execution_contract: Read the registry entry and category.
Map each platform to its expected install path.
Verify SKILL.md exists at each target after install.
output_contract: A degraded path for unsupported local environments.

failure_branch.condition: A platform directory is missing.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Report manual target paths and keep dry-run mode non-failing.

cases.user_prompt: 提交代码并创建 PR，按项目约定走。
execution_contract: Check working tree status before staging.
Review diffs before commit.
Run required self-checks before PR creation.
output_contract: A commit hash or explicit reason no commit was made.
A PR URL or next manual step.

failure_branch.condition: Tests fail or secrets are detected.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Do not commit or push; report the blocker.

cases.user_prompt: My feature branch has conflicts before pull request; help me finish the git workflow.
execution_contract: Inspect status and current branch.
Pull or rebase according to project convention.
Resolve conflicts with user-owned changes preserved.
output_contract: A final clean status or precise remaining conflict list.

failure_branch.condition: Unrelated user changes are present.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Preserve them and ask before staging those files.

cases.user_prompt: How should I configure .codex config and install these skills?
execution_contract: Identify the target platform and config path.
Use the platform-specific path table.
Apply the troubleshooting decision tree when loading fails.
output_contract: A verification command or manual check for the platform.

failure_branch.condition: The target platform is unclear.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask which agent runtime is being configured before giving paths.

cases.user_prompt: 迁移skill from Hermes Agent to Cursor and explain the trigger differences.
execution_contract: Compare Hermes category-based paths to Cursor skills or rules paths.
Preserve name and description fields.
Warn when a large skill would be wasteful as always-loaded Cursor Rules.
output_contract: A trigger behavior note for Cursor Skills versus Cursor Rules.

failure_branch.condition: The skill is larger than Cursor Rules guidance.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Recommend Cursor Skills instead of Rules.

cases.user_prompt: Review this PR diff for bugs, security risks, and missing tests before merge.
execution_contract: Identify the review surface and changed behavior.
Read relevant execution paths, not only edited lines.
Report severity-ordered findings with fixes.
output_contract: Approve or request-changes decision with test gaps.

failure_branch.condition: No code, diff, or design artifact is available.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask for the artifact before inventing findings or giving approval.

cases.user_prompt: Review this SKILL.md quality and tell me whether it passes the skill checklist.
execution_contract: Detect that this is a SKILL.md review request.
Defer to skill-review-workflow rather than ordinary code review.
State the boundary clearly.
output_contract: Boundary note and redirected review path.

failure_branch.condition: The artifact is a SKILL.md quality review rather than ordinary code.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Do not apply code-review severity rules; use skill-review-workflow instead.

cases.user_prompt: Debug this failing test and find the root cause without guessing.
execution_contract: Capture expected and actual behavior.
Reproduce the failure with the smallest command.
Isolate one factor at a time before fixing.
output_contract: Root cause hypothesis and verification result.

failure_branch.condition: The failure cannot be reproduced in the current environment.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Preserve diagnostic evidence and label the result as limited triage.

cases.user_prompt: This bug is flaky and only fails sometimes; help me debug it systematically.
execution_contract: Collect repeated runs before changing code.
Inspect timing, randomness, and shared state.
Label confidence based on reproduced evidence.

failure_branch.condition: The failure appears only intermittently and no signal is captured.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Run repeated diagnostics and avoid claiming a fix from one passing run.

cases.user_prompt: Design tests for this new API behavior including negative and boundary cases.
execution_contract: Extract the behavior contract.
Map risk to test levels.
Design success, failure, and boundary cases.

failure_branch.condition: The behavior contract is vague or contradictory.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask for acceptance criteria before inventing test cases.

cases.user_prompt: Improve this flaky test suite without making the tests broad and slow.
execution_contract: Identify timing, randomness, and shared state risks.
Choose the lowest useful test level.
Preserve behavior assertions while reducing flake.

failure_branch.condition: The suite has no clear behavior contract or failure signal.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Request the failing output or contract before rewriting tests.

cases.user_prompt: Turn this vague dashboard idea into requirements and acceptance criteria.
execution_contract: Restate actor, goal, and outcome.
Identify constraints and non-goals.
Produce testable acceptance criteria.

failure_branch.condition: Required goals conflict or the actor is unknown.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask the smallest blocking question instead of fabricating requirements.

cases.user_prompt: Clarify this vague bug report into expected behavior, actual behavior, and acceptance checks.
execution_contract: Separate expected and actual behavior.
List constraints and assumptions.
Turn the result into pass/fail checks.
output_contract: Open questions that block debugging or tests.

failure_branch.condition: The report has no observable symptom or expected result.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Ask for the missing symptom or expected result before planning implementation.

cases.user_prompt: Plan this risky database migration with phases, validation gates, and rollback points.
execution_contract: Define objective, scope, non-goals, and constraints.
Split work into ordered phases.
Identify risks, gates, and rollback points.

failure_branch.condition: Rollback is unknown for a high-risk change.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Add a discovery phase before irreversible implementation work.

cases.user_prompt: Plan my product idea, but I have not decided who the user is or what success means.
execution_contract: Detect missing requirements.
Limit planning to discovery.
Route to clarification before deep sequencing.

failure_branch.condition: Requirements are too unclear to plan safely.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Invoke requirements clarification before building a detailed plan.

cases.user_prompt: Design logs, metrics, traces, alerts, and dashboards for this API service.
execution_contract: Map critical journeys and failure modes.
Define signals for each failure mode.
Choose alert rules tied to impact.

failure_branch.condition: Telemetry may expose sensitive data.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Redact fields and sample safely before proposing logs or traces.

cases.user_prompt: Review these noisy alerts and make them actionable without missing user impact.
execution_contract: Tie alerts to user impact or SLO burn.
Separate dashboard signals from paging signals.
Document threshold rationale.

failure_branch.condition: Thresholds are unknown or baselines are absent.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Start with dashboards and non-paging alerts before creating pages.

cases.user_prompt: Write an incident retro for this outage timeline with root causes and action items.
execution_contract: Establish factual timeline and impact.
Separate triggers, symptoms, contributing factors, and root causes.
Create action items with owners and verification.

failure_branch.condition: The incident is still active or mitigation is incomplete.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Switch to mitigation mode and postpone the retrospective.

cases.user_prompt: Analyze this incident even though the timeline is incomplete and some facts are unknown.
execution_contract: Mark unknowns explicitly.
Avoid blame and speculation.
Identify evidence needed to complete the retro.
output_contract: Evidence request and safe next steps.

failure_branch.condition: Facts are missing and only rumor is available.
failure_branch.expected_behavior: Mark unknowns instead of inventing certainty or assigning blame.
